item.title: Federal budget tabled in House of Commons
item.description: The federal government tabled its 2026 budget on Monday afternoon, with new spending on housing and clean energy.

item.title: Storm system moves across the Maritimes
item.description: A heavy storm system is sweeping through the Maritimes, bringing high winds and power outages to thousands.

item.title: Oilers advance to second round of NHL playoffs
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers defeated the Kings 4-2 in Game 6 to advance.
